teamMembers.name: Troy
teamMembers.bio: The final polish on the Burn St. sound. A composer, producer, and multi-instrumentalist (guitar, bass, keys), Troy leads the collective's mixing and mastering to ensure every track hits with maximum impact.

teamMembers.name: Gary
teamMembers.bio: Specializes in guitar, bass, keys, synths, programming, and sampling. Blending warm vintage tones with sharp modern aesthetics across composing, writing, arranging, and mixing.

teamMembers.name: Matt
teamMembers.bio: The thoughtful, quiet voice in the room. Specializing in drums, percussion, and bass, Matt's considered approach to production anchors every track with a deeply purposeful groove.
